title: Money
description: Monetary value in integer minor currency units with ISO 4217 code. Never floating point
$comment: Consumers must look up the ISO 4217 exponent for the currency code. JPY/KRW: exponent 0 (amount IS face value). KWD/BHD/OMR: exponent 3. Most currencies: exponent 2. See https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html

amount.description: Value in the smallest currency unit (pence, cents, sen). The consumer must apply the ISO 4217 exponent to convert to a display value

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code. Use the code for the currency of the amount, not the reporting currency
